summary: Iteration 4 retest of Sales.js after import fixes — ALL PASS. Registered fresh user via /api/auth/register, created group, added 3 products (Camisa Roja / Pantalon Azul / Zapatos Negros), sold each at 30€. Loaded /app/ventas with the session token: page renders cleanly (no error boundary), sales-list shows 3 sale-row-* entries, export-csv downloads ventas_2026-05-27.csv with correct headers (Fecha,Producto,Categoría,Precio compra (€),Precio venta (€),Beneficio (€),Vendedor) and 3 data rows, input-search-sales filters by product name ('Camisa'→1 row), by seller name ('Sales Tester'→3 rows), shows 'Sin resultados' on no match, and clears properly. view-rank shows rank-list and hides the search input; view-list restores both sales-list and the search input. The Sales.js imports (useMemo, Search, Download, API) are now correctly present.
critical_code_review_comments: Sales.js exportCsv still uses raw fetch with manual Authorization header (line 40); the rest of the app uses the shared `api` axios client. Carry-over from iter 3 — recommend api.get('/sales/export.csv', { responseType: 'blob' }) for interceptor consistency.
server.py is still ~870 lines (carry-over from iter 2/3) — split into modules.
POST /products still loops insert_one for cantidad>1; should use insert_many (carry-over).
CSV export uses simple .replace('"', "'") quoting (carry-over) — prefer Python's csv module to handle embedded newlines/commas safely.
Dashboard re-iterates all_products multiple times per bucket (carry-over) — could be a single $facet aggregation.

success_rate.backend: 100% (re-used iter3 pytest results — backend not re-run)
success_rate.frontend: 100% — Sales page renders, export-csv downloads valid CSV, input-search-sales filters correctly, view toggles work

test_credentials: Fresh user registered each run via /api/auth/register; iter4 used it4_sales_5f54058c@test.com / password123 (token kxN0MyVmKnY6Lsyzrf16VHrJuknlEhfbZdxcUpid2V0).
seed_data_creation: Created group TEST_IT4_Sales (codigo_union U5VYX3, admin user_c4637e490a00) with 3 sold products (Camisa Roja, Pantalon Azul, Zapatos Negros) — left in DB, no UI cleanup endpoint.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sales.js page is now fully working. Backend product sell endpoint is PUT /api/products/{id}/sell (not POST — easy to trip on). CSV filename follows ventas_YYYY-MM-DD.csv pattern; CSV header includes the EUR € symbol so encoding must be UTF-8 (server returns it correctly). input-search-sales matches against s.nombre and s.sold_by_name (case-insensitive). No outstanding blocking bugs from iter 3.
rca of the issue: N/A — bug from iteration 3 (missing imports in Sales.js) is fully fixed. Imports at /app/frontend/src/pages/Sales.js lines 1-3 now include useMemo, Search, Download, and { API, buildFileUrl } from ../lib/api. Verified end-to-end.
